info.title: Pineapple API
info.description: Field-operations API for managing assets (vehicles, properties, equipment). Authentication is handled by Better Auth + Google OAuth; send the session cookie obtained from `/api/auth/*` with requests to protected `/api/*` routes.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Create and read assets owned by the caller

tags.name: Maintenance
tags.description: Create and read maintenance records and tasks for assets owned by the caller

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Read and update the authenticated user's domain profile

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Authenticated home-screen read model for fleet health and maintenance queue

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Authenticated durable notification inbox and read lifecycle

tags.name: Teams
tags.description: Create and read the caller's team for sharing assets

cookieAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
cookieAuth.description: Better Auth session cookie, set after completing the Google OAuth flow at `/api/auth/sign-in/social?provider=google`.

status.description: Derived from nextDue and todayUtc using calendar-day rules

daysDue.description: Signed calendar-day distance from todayUtc to nextDue; negative means overdue

status.description: Derived from nextDue and todayUtc using calendar-day rules

daysDue.description: Signed calendar-day distance from todayUtc to nextDue; negative means overdue

viewerDisplayName.description: Authenticated user's display name when available

todayUtc.description: Server-side UTC calendar date used for urgency calculations

notificationEmail.description: User-controlled contact email reminders may be sent to. Null when unset; distinct from the read-only provider auth email.

notificationEmailVerified.description: Whether the contact email is verified. Reminder emails are only delivered when true.

status.description: `verified` when the address is now confirmed; `invalid` is the single non-leaking outcome for any unknown, expired, used, superseded, or address-changed token.

get.description: Returns ok when the Worker is serving. No authentication.
Returns the caller's active (non-archived) assets and their counts by category.

403.description: The asset belongs to another user

get.description: Returns up to 20 active assets owned by the caller that match the free-text query.

403.description: The asset belongs to another user

get.summary: List maintenance records for an asset
get.description: Returns records newest first by performed date, then creation time. Archived asset history remains readable.

403.description: The asset belongs to another user
The asset belongs to another user

get.summary: List maintenance tasks for an asset
get.description: Returns tasks ordered by nextDue ascending (soonest due first). Archived asset tasks remain readable.

403.description: The asset belongs to another user

delete.description: Permanently removes the task. Linked maintenance records are preserved with taskId set to null.

403.description: The task belongs to another user

get.description: Returns fleet totals, maintenance health counts, and the cross-asset maintenance queue for the authenticated user in a single response.
Returns the caller's durable cross-asset activity feed with server-side filters and cursor pagination.
Returns the authenticated domain user's profile, including email, display name, and onboarding state.

patch.description: Updates the caller's display name. Completes onboarding on the first successful update.

put.description: Stores the caller's contact email. When it matches the provider-verified auth email it is stored verified immediately; otherwise it is stored unverified and a verification email is requested. Returns the updated profile.

429.description: Verification send rejected by a rate limit

delete.description: Clears the caller's contact email and its verified state. Idempotent: succeeds with the unchanged profile when none is set. Returns the updated profile.

post.description: Requests a fresh verification email for the caller's current, still-unverified contact email. Subject to per-address cooldown and per-address / per-user daily caps.

409.description: No contact email is set to verify

429.description: Rejected by a verification-send rate limit

post.description: Public, session-optional endpoint that confirms a verification token from the emailed link. Returns a generic `invalid` outcome for any unknown, expired, used, superseded, or address-changed token without revealing which case applied.

get.description: Returns the caller's durable notification inbox with unread count and cursor pagination. Rows include self-contained asset and task snapshots.

post.description: Marks a single caller-owned notification read and returns the updated notification. Unknown or foreign ids return 404.
Marks all unread notifications owned by the caller read and returns unreadCount.

200.description: Unread count after marking all read

post.description: Creates a team with the caller as owner and sole member. Fails with 409 if the caller already belongs to a team.

409.description: Caller already belongs to a team

get.description: Returns the caller's team with its members, or an explicit null when the caller has no team.
